title: aegilops squarrosa subsp. eusquarrosa
intro: Aegilops squarrosa subsp. eusquarrosa, also known as a wild goatgrass, is a type of plant that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops squarrosa subsp. eusquarrosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
